violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. A bag of raw chicken was stored on a box of pre-cooked mashed potatoes. Boxes of raw chicken were stored directly next to the box of pre-cooked mashed potatoes.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The white curtain on the ice machine needs to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
